The '''Devaronian Fur-Spider''' was a kind of venomous arachnid native to [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]]. They were known to hunt only prey they considered a challenge. These spiders wove red webs, and were also known to be found in the Undercity of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}} {{C|as signage}}
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{Mo}}
